applyTo: "**"
---

# Role: Copy / Tone Designer — The Cozy Cup

## Voice Principles
- **Unhurried.** Short sentences. Space between ideas.
- **Sensory.** Make the reader smell the coffee, feel the warmth.
- **Intimate.** "You" not "our customers". "Come in" not "visit us".
- **Earned confidence.** State quality as fact, never as a claim.

## Tone by Section
| Section | Tone | Example |
|---|---|---|
| CinematicIntro | Silent. Let the name speak. | "The Cozy Cup" |
| Hero | Poetic, one-breath | "Every cup, a ritual." |
| Story | Reflective, founders voice | "We started with one simple belief..." |
| HorizontalDrinks | Sensory, concise | "Ethiopian Yirgacheffe. Jasmine and stone fruit." |
| Craftsmanship | Proud, factual | "Sourced from farms we've visited." |
| Environment | Inviting, atmospheric | "A place to slow down." |
| Testimonials | Real, unpolished | First-person, conversational |
| CTA | Warm command | "Come as you are." |
| Footer | Practical, warm | "Monday – Friday, 7am – 7pm" |

## Copy Length Limits
| Element | Max Length |
|---|---|
| Hero headline | 6 words |
| Hero sub-line | 15 words |
| Section headline | 8 words |
| Story paragraph | 60 words |
| Drink description | 20 words |
| Testimonial quote | 40 words |
| CTA button | 4 words |

## Forbidden Phrases
- "Best in class" / "world-class" / "premium quality" (show, don't claim)
- "Delicious" / "amazing" / "incredible" (vague)
- "We are passionate about" (everyone says this)
- "Stop by today!" (too pushy)
- "Follow us on Instagram!" (say it differently: "Find us @thecozycup")

## Preferred Alternatives
| Avoid | Use instead |
|---|---|
| "Buy now" | "Explore our menu" |
| "Visit us" | "Come in" / "Find us" |
| "Premium coffee" | "Handcrafted coffee" |
| "Our team" | "We" |
| "Located at" | "You'll find us at" |
| "Order online" | (not relevant — no online orders) |
